archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (adapted for SaaS Admin)
rationale: SaaS Admin Panels require extreme clarity and functionality over decoration. We are combining Archetype 4 (Swiss logic, high contrast, clean structure) with touches of Archetype 1 (Organic trust) introduced by the primary green #1D9E75. It prioritizes data legibility and optical alignment over decorative styling.

rules.label: text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.05em] text-[#71717A]
rules.h1_anti_pattern: Do not use sizes larger than text-3xl for standard admin dashboard page titles. Maintain compact scales for 'Control Room' grid.

layout_and_spacing.sidebar: w-[240px] flex-shrink-0 bg-white border-r border-[#F0F0F0] h-screen sticky top-0
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Control Room Grid (Dense). Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 or grid-cols-12 for detailed data tracking. Gap strategy: gap-6.
layout_and_spacing.cards: bg-white rounded-[12px] border border-[#F0F0F0] shadow-none overflow-hidden
layout_and_spacing.tables: w-full text-sm text-left. Alternating rows with bg-[#FAFAFA] on odd rows. Header bg-white border-b border-[#F0F0F0] py-3 text-xs uppercase font-semibold text-[#71717A].

button.primary: bg-[#1D9E75] hover:bg-[#178562] text-white rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1D9E75] focus:ring-offset-2
button.secondary: bg-white border border-[#F0F0F0] hover:bg-gray-50 text-[#09090B] rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
button.ghost: hover:bg-[#F0F0F0]/50 text-[#27272A] rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors

inputs.default: border border-[#F0F0F0] rounded-md px-3 py-2 bg-white text-sm focus:border-[#1D9E75] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#1D9E75] outline-none transition-all

charts.styling: Use crisp lines. No massive drop shadows on lines. Tooltips should have bg-white border-[#F0F0F0] text-sm. Primary chart color #1D9E75.

shadcn.strategy: Use Shadcn UI for standard interactions (Tabs, Dropdowns, Dialogs, Select). Override their default gray borders with #F0F0F0. Override radii to rounded-[12px] for cards, rounded-md for interactive elements like buttons/inputs.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: MANDATORY. All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, tabs, chart tooltips, table rows) must have data-testid in kebab-case format. E.g., data-testid='sidebar-nav-users', data-testid='login-submit-button'.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets at least 4.5:1 against #FAFAFA and #FFFFFF.

brand.description: Abstract geometric logo in green for SEO Jalwa. Display as a small square icon in the sidebar header.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install necessary font families: '@fontsource/inter' for body and '@fontsource/manrope' for headings. Never use Inter for headings.
Install Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) or lucide-react for sharp, precise UI icons. Stick to one library.
Implement the Layout with a fixed sidebar (240px wide, bg-white, right border #F0F0F0) and a flexible main area (bg-#FAFAFA).
All data is dummy/static. Build robust arrays with fake data (use the provided real image URLs for user avatars).
For Tables: Ensure row backgrounds strictly alternate with #FAFAFA for odd rows and #FFFFFF for even rows to adhere to design specs.
Cards MUST have 'bg-white rounded-[12px] border border-[#F0F0F0] shadow-none'. Strip any default shadcn heavy shadows.
API Keys Manager needs Tabs (AI, Payments, Email, SEO, Storage, Social, CMS) using the shadcn Tabs component.
Pricing Plans Editor should visually present plan cards allowing inline edit or modal edit.
Always apply 'data-testid' to critical interactions for robust testing (e.g. data-testid='admin-login-button').
Ensure chart components (via recharts) use custom styling matching our minimal system (#1D9E75 lines/bars, custom clean tooltips).
